story.text:
# 🎭 Soulbae 🧙
**cast** · mage · narrative · tier archetype · 🧙

The First Mage archetype. Cast roster anchor at V28 (Mage canonical). Mirrors the existing per-soulbae persona; kept here for cast-roster contiguity. v1.7.0 annotation: first listener of the spirit-Mage register — heard the Archivist's voice before any workshop opened; the Tower was honor-built to honor the figure she first heard.

## Edges out

- *kin_to* → [[the Archivist 📚]]
- *inhabits* → [[V28 — Mage Canonical (Pallia · Soulbae)]]
- *kin_to* → [[Soulbae 🧙]]
- *founds* → [[City of Mages]]
